title: Let's Have Some FUN Mining
description: Replaces the title screen music with the parody song "Let's Have Some FUN in Minecraft" by SkyDoesMinecraft.
body:
The guy behind the song might be a wee bit controversial nowadays, but lets "separate the art from the artist" as they say. I can't say I wasn't a fan back at the peak of his popularity.

All this pack does is replace the title screen music with the Minecraft parody "**_Let's Have Some FUN in Minecraft_**", sung by then popular Minecraft YouTuber _**SkyDoesMinecraft**_. Contains proper artist and song info in English US.

I don't think I'll ever understand the giant following behind him calling gold ingots "butter." I see WHY, but not the reasoning for garnering such a following for the phrase.

Song used:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bQZLgmJD0mI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Minecraft title screen. It shows a music toast in the top left, reading, "SkyDoesMinecraft - Let's Have Some FUN in Minecraft".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nl1fXATd/images/6a276856603fb2230b7ed0b713cd77a5ea99a42a.png)
